body:
## ما هذا / What this is

طلب "V3 — آلة الإيراد". بعد فحص الريبو تبيّن أن **الطبقات السبع المقترحة موجودة فعلاً** كأنظمة `*_os` محكومة ومغطّاة باختبارات (لا حزمة greenfield). لذلك نُفِّذ V3 كـ **طبقة تكامل صادقة** فوق المعمارية القائمة — لا حزمة موازية مكرّرة تكسر الدستور أو الـ CI.

The proposed "V3 Revenue Machine" already exists in canonical form. Rather than dump a parallel `dealix_launch_package_v3/` scaffold (which would duplicate the live system and violate the enforced doctrine + CI), this PR delivers V3 as a **truthful integration layer**:

1. **Map** each of the 7 layers → its real home (endpoint / module / script).
2. **Close** the one genuine micro-gap: inbound first-touch **UTM attribution**, routed through the **governed** pipeline (no flat-file bypass).
3. **Verify** the wiring with a repo check (a check, not a promise).

## Micro-gap closed — governed first-touch attribution

| Piece | File |
| --- | --- |
| Allow-listed, length-bounded UTM/click-id sanitizer | `dealix/revenue_ops_autopilot/attribution.py` 🆕 |
| `FunnelLeadRecord.attribution` + `capture_lead` wiring (stored in the governed autopilot ledger + audit log) | `schemas.py`, `orchestrator.py` |
| `PublicLeadPayload.attribution` (public funnel is `extra="forbid"`) | `api/routers/revenue_ops_autopilot.py` |
| SSR-safe first-touch capture + app-wide tracker | `frontend/src/lib/utm.ts` 🆕, `AttributionTracker.tsx` 🆕 |
| Attached at the **real** submit points | `DiagnosticFunnelContent.tsx`, `RiskScoreFunnel.tsx` |

Attribution flows into the **same governed lead record** (Revenue OS / autopilot store) — it does **not** write a parallel `leads.jsonl` or bypass the Decision Passport.

## Map + verification

- `dealix/config/v3_revenue_machine.yaml` — registry of the **7 layers → 57 canonical artifacts** (revenue_os, sales_os, case_study_engine, delivery_os, analytics, safe_send_gateway) with doctrine bindings.
- `dealix/commercial_ops/v3_revenue_machine.py` + `scripts/verify_v3_revenue_machine.py` — checks every artifact exists:

```
$ python3 scripts/verify_v3_revenue_machine.py
  ok: 7 layers, 57 canonical artifacts present
DEALIX_V3_REVENUE_MACHINE_VERDICT=PASS
```

- `docs/commercial/DEALIX_V3_REVENUE_MACHINE_MAP_AR.md` — bilingual AR/EN map.

## Doctrine & tests

- Honors the enforced non-negotiables (`safe_send_gateway/doctrine.py`) and the 7 Dealix Laws. No external sends; no scraping; no bypass.
- `tests/test_v3_attribution_capture.py` — sanitizer bounds + governed record persistence.
- `tests/test_v3_revenue_machine.py` — registry declares 7 layers and **every referenced artifact exists** (guards against rot).

## Local checks

- ✅ `verify_v3_revenue_machine.py` → `PASS`
- ✅ New test logic validated against real `pydantic` (attribution flows into the persisted record; allow-list drops unknown keys)
- ✅ `ruff` + `black` clean on all new/changed lines (the 2 pre-existing ruff items and black drift in unrelated lines of the edited router/orchestrator were left untouched per AGENTS.md)
- ⚠️ Full `pytest` runs in CI (the conftest bootstraps the whole FastAPI app stack; not available in this container)

---
🤖 Draft for review.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01MgxhwNv6a9ZKsztoPUUJtm

---
_Generated by [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code/session_01MgxhwNv6a9ZKsztoPUUJtm)_

commits.messageBody:
…tribution + 7-layer wiring map

V3 is realized as a truthful integration layer over the existing canonical
architecture (not a parallel package): it maps the seven Revenue-Machine layers
to their real homes, closes the one genuine micro-gap (inbound first-touch
attribution), and adds a verification script that proves the wiring.

Micro-gap — governed first-touch attribution:
- attribution.py: allow-listed, length-bounded UTM/click-id sanitizer
- FunnelLeadRecord.attribution + orchestrator.capture_lead wiring (stored in the
  governed autopilot ledger + audit log; no flat-file bypass)
- PublicLeadPayload.attribution field (public funnel is extra="forbid")
- frontend utm.ts (SSR-safe first-touch capture) + app-wide AttributionTracker;
  attached at the real submit points (DiagnosticFunnelContent, RiskScoreFunnel)

Integration map + verification:
- dealix/config/v3_revenue_machine.yaml: registry of 7 layers -> 57 canonical
  artifacts (revenue_os, sales_os, case_study_engine, delivery_os, analytics,
  safe_send_gateway) with doctrine bindings
- v3_revenue_machine.py + scripts/verify_v3_revenue_machine.py: checks every
  artifact exists -> DEALIX_V3_REVENUE_MACHINE_VERDICT=PASS
- docs/commercial/DEALIX_V3_REVENUE_MACHINE_MAP_AR.md: bilingual map
- tests: attribution flow + registry artifact-existence guard

Honors the enforced non-negotiables (safe_send_gateway doctrine) and the 7
Dealix Laws; no external sends, no bypass of the governed pipeline.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01MgxhwNv6a9ZKsztoPUUJtm

commits.messageBody:
frontend/src/lib/utm.ts was silently skipped by `git add -A` because the
repo's .gitignore has a Python-artifact `lib/` pattern (see AGENTS.md note).
This broke `next build` — "Module not found: Can't resolve '@/lib/utm'" in
AttributionTracker.tsx and RiskScoreFunnel.tsx — failing the Railway Docker
image build. Force-add the file like the other frontend/src/lib/* files.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01MgxhwNv6a9ZKsztoPUUJtm
commits.messageHeadline: fix(frontend): force-add utm.ts blocked by .gitignore lib/ rule

title: feat(revenue): V3 Revenue Machine integration layer — governed UTM attribution + 7-layer wiring map
